allow:
Bash(curl -s "https://api.ffxivvenues.com/v1.0/venue" -H "User-Agent: Dalamud-VenueScope/1.0" --max-time 15 | python -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total venues: {len\(data\)}'\)
with_res = 0
no_res = 0
for v in data:
    schedules = v.get\('schedule', []\)
    has_res = any\(s.get\('resolution'\) is not None for s in schedules\)
    overrides = [o for o in v.get\('scheduleOverrides', []\) if o.get\('open'\)]
    if has_res or overrides:
        with_res += 1
    else:
        no_res += 1
print\(f'Venues with a resolution: {with_res}'\)
print\(f'Venues without any resolution: {no_res}'\)
# Show first venue that has a resolution
for v in data:
    schedules = v.get\('schedule', []\)
    for s in schedules:
        if s.get\('resolution'\):
            print\(f'Example resolved venue: {v[\\"name\\"]} | DC: {v.get\(\\"location\\",{}\).get\(\\"dataCenter\\"\)} | res.start: {s[\\"resolution\\"][\\"start\\"]}'\)
            break
    else:
        continue
    break
" 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && gh repo create NalaPraline/VenueScope --public --description "Browse FFXIV community events from Partake.gg and FFXIVenue in-game" 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && git init && git checkout -b main && git remote add origin https://github.com/NalaPraline/VenueScope.git 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && git add .editorconfig .gitignore LICENSE.md README.md VenueScope.sln && git add docs/pluginmaster.json && git add Data/goat.png && git add .github/workflows/pr-build.yml .github/workflows/release.yml && git add VenueScope/VenueScope.cs VenueScope/VenueScope.csproj VenueScope/VenueScope.json VenueScope/Configuration.cs VenueScope/packages.lock.json && git add VenueScope/Models/VenueEvent.cs VenueScope/Models/PartakeModels.cs && git add VenueScope/Services/PartakeService.cs VenueScope/Services/FFXIVenueService.cs VenueScope/Services/EventCacheService.cs VenueScope/Services/NotificationService.cs && git add VenueScope/Helpers/CachedEventStrings.cs VenueScope/Helpers/EventFilterCache.cs VenueScope/Helpers/EventRenderer.cs VenueScope/Helpers/EventStringCache.cs && git add VenueScope/UI/ConfigWindow.cs VenueScope/UI/MainWindow.cs && git status 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && git commit -m "Initial release" && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && git tag v1.0.0.0 && git push origin v1.0.0.0 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 5 && cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && gh run list --repo NalaPraline/VenueScope --limit 3 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && gh api repos/NalaPraline/VenueScope/pages --method POST --input - <<'EOF'
{"source":{"branch":"main","path":"/docs"}}
EOF
git tag v1.0.0.0 && git push origin v1.0.0.0 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 8 && cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && gh run list --repo NalaPraline/VenueScope --limit 2 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && git add Data/icon.png docs/pluginmaster.json && git commit -m "Add plugin icon" && git push 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && git add VenueScope/VenueScope.csproj docs/pluginmaster.json && git commit -m "Add plugin icon and settings window" && git push && git tag v1.0.0.1 && git push origin v1.0.0.1 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 5 && cd "D:/Dev/Plugins/VenueScope" && gh run list --repo NalaPraline/VenueScope --limit 1 2>&1)
